content: Check existing image-gen helper pattern in codebase (for Gemini Nano Banana)
Generate AI vault frame image (black military + cyan/ambre LED) via Gemini
Integrate vault frame image into VaultSection as layered background with overlaid dials
Backend: add dexscreener.py module + hybrid mode (off/demo/custom)
Backend: extend vault_state schema with DEX fields + admin endpoints
Backend: launch DexScreener poll loop as async task (30s interval)
Frontend: add DEX config section in /admin/vault page
Frontend: badge live status on the public vault (demo token / custom / off)
Test end-to-end: image rendering + DEX polling + tick generation
